title: sarcotoxicum salicifolium
intro: Sarcotoxicum salicifolium, a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, is also known as the 'sick-making' plant due to its toxic properties. The medicinal properties of Sarcotoxicum salicifolium lie in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. Consuming this plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and acting as a natural laxative. Herbal preparations of Sarcotoxicum salicifolium include tea and infusion, which are typically used to alleviate digestive issues and other associated health problems.
